description:
Educational module that demonstrates motion-planning concepts on a configurable grid of simulated arms — task-space goals, end-effector control frames, linear/orientation constraints, collision avoidance, multi-arm coordination.

Each arm runs a scripted scenario in its own goroutine. The planner's trajectory is previewed as a green ghost trail in the 3D scene viewer, and any geometry the planned trajectory intersects is tinted red. A small 3D plaque under each arm labels what it's demonstrating.


EXAMPLE SERVICE ATTRIBUTES

    {
      "arms": ["arm_a1", "arm_a2", "arm_a3", "arm_a4"],
      "preset_set": "ee_only",
      "ee_frames": {
        "arm_a3": "gripper_a3",
        "arm_a4": "gripper_a4"
      },
      "loop": true,
      "interval_s": 4,
      "preview_density": 4
    }


PRESET BUNDLES

Set preset_set to one of these to activate a canonical arm-to-preset mapping:

    ee_only            — End-Effector Control Frame Variations (4 arms)
    ee_variations      — EE Control Frames + Linear Constraint Comparison (8 arms, default)
    obstacle_geometry  — Obstacle Geometry Variations (4 arms)
    constraint_types   — Constraint and Dynamic-Obstacle Variations (4 arms)
    all                — Every preset (16 arms, heaviest)


INDIVIDUAL PRESETS

Task-space EE control:
    random_translation, random_rotation,
    random_translation_linear, random_rotation_linear

Obstacle geometry:
    arc_over_obstacle, duck_under_obstacle,
    gripper_with_box, corridor_passthrough

Constraint and dynamic:
    linear_constraint, orientation_constraint, dynamic_obstacle

Coordinated and progressive:
    multi_arm_choreography, obstacle_progression, single_arm_obstacle


ATTRIBUTES

    arms                (required, []string) — arm component names
    preset_set          (string)              — named bundle of arm-to-preset mappings
    arm_scenarios       ({arm: preset})       — explicit per-arm binding, overrides preset_set
    ee_frames           ({arm: frame})        — per-arm planner tool-frame override
    loop                (bool, default true)  — cycle scenarios indefinitely
    interval_s          (float, default 3.0)  — pause between iterations
    preview_density     (int, default 6)      — ghost trajectory smoothness
    abort_on_collision  (bool, default true)  — skip execute on collision
    tick_hz             (float, default 30)   — visualization tick rate


ARM REQUIREMENTS

Arms must use rdk:builtin:simulated with simulate-time enabled so they animate over wall clock:

    {
      "name": "arm_a1",
      "api": "rdk:component:arm",
      "model": "rdk:builtin:simulated",
      "attributes": { "arm-model": "ur5e", "simulate-time": true },
      "frame": { "parent": "world", "translation": { "x": 1000, "y": 1000, "z": 0 } }
    }


See the GitHub README for full preset descriptions, DoCommand verbs, and complete example machine configs:
https://github.com/viam-labs/example-motion-constraints-go#readme

models.short_description: Plans + executes scripted motion scenarios on simulated arms with live trajectory previews.
